en: How’s the weather today?

ab: makungu ti’ingi soni. karatumurua mima macici canumu.
ch: B:天氣有點冷。要多喝熱水。

en: How’s the weather today?

ab: macici ti’ingi soni. karatumurua mima canumu.
en: It’s a bit hot, so you need to drink more water.
How’s the weather outside?
The sun is bright and remember to wear sunscreen.
How’s the weather outside?
There are a lot of clouds but no sun in the sky.
How is the weather tomorrow?

ab: makai tia ’akia taniarʉ nura. ’itumuru ʉcʉ, tatia pariapara.
ch: B:明天好像沒有太陽。雲很多，風很大。
en: It will be cloudy and windy but not sunny tomorrow.

ab: tia makananu kakangca noo arapiningi kita taniara?
ch: A:我們出遊那天天氣如何?
en: How was the weather the day we go out?

ab: makai tia makungu. tia matikuru pananapa.
ch: B:那天好像有點冷。出門要穿外套。
en: It was a bit cold and you needed to wear a jacket when you went outside.

ab: tia makananu kakangca noo tarasangara taniara?
en: How’s the weather on the weekend?
It will be sunny on the weekend.

ab: tia kara ’umu’ʉcanʉ noo arapiningi kita taniara?
ch: A:我們出遊那天會下雨嗎?
en: Will it be rainy the day we go out?

ab: tia mangiri taniara mesua, ka’anʉ tia ’umu’ʉcanʉ.
ch: B:那天天氣晴朗，不會下雨。
en: It will have no rain and be sunny that day.

ab: tia kara ’umu’ʉcanʉ noo arapiningi kita taniara?
en: Will it be rainy that day?
Yes, it will be rainy that day.
Is it raining now?
The rain stops and the sun comes out.
Is it raining now?
It is raining and I don’t have an umbrella with me.
Is it raining outside?

ab: ka’anʉ ’umu’ʉcanʉ masini. tia ’umu’ʉcanʉ noo ca’ania. marivicia tarucung.
ch: B:現在沒有下雨。中午過後會下雨，出門要帶傘。
en: It is not raining now, but it will be rainy in the afternoon, so you need to bring an umbrella when you go out.
Will it be very cold in winter next year?

ab: ʉʉ’ʉ, tia makungu kana’amisan nuaceni. tia ’itumuru patikurua.
ch: B:是，明年冬天會很冷。要穿很多衣服。
en: Yes, it will be very cold in winter next year, so you need to put on extra layers.

ab: tia kara macici kana’ʉcana cenana isi?
en: Will it be very hot in summer this year?

ab: ʉʉ’ʉ, macici kana’ʉcana, tia karatumuru mima canumu.
ch: B:是，夏天會很熱，要多喝水。
en: Yes, it will be very hot and you need to drink more water.
Do you like spring?

ch: B:我喜歡春天，天氣很溫暖。
en: I like spring because the weather is warm.
Do you like autumn?

ch: B:我不喜歡秋天，秋天有好多颱風。
en: I don’t like autumn because there are lots of typhoons in autumn.
